headlines.text: Iran sends new peace proposal to US via Pakistan as Day 63 deadline looms
S&P 500 surges past 7,200 record, Apple jumps 3% on earnings beat
Gas prices hit $4.39/gallon national average, up 9 cents in a single day
May Day protests sweep nation: workers, teachers boycott work and school
White House Correspondents Dinner shooter Cole Allen faces presidential assassination charges
Trump warns Iran war 'may resume,' says only he knows status of talks
The Devil Wears Prada 2 opens today with $10M in previews, projected $85M-$100M weekend
War Powers clock hits 60 days: Congress can't agree if deadline is real or not
Spirit Airlines preparing to shut down after government bailout talks fail
Elon Musk testifies xAI used OpenAI model outputs to train Grok

breaking.text: Iran sends revised peace proposal through Pakistani mediators on Day 63 deadline — Trump says only he knows the real status of talks

stories.hed: Iran Sends New Peace Proposal as Trump Keeps War Card on the Table
stories.dek: Iran quietly slipped a revised proposal to US mediators in Islamabad today, which is the diplomatic equivalent of sliding a note under the door of someone who is actively threatening to kick it in. Trump responded by saying only he and 'a handful' of people know what's actually going on — so everyone else is just vibing.

stories.hed: Israel Kills 15 in South Lebanon Despite Active Ceasefire
stories.dek: Israeli strikes killed at least 15 people in southern Lebanon today despite a ceasefire that was extended just last week. The US embassy in Lebanon is now calling for an emergency meeting between Israeli and Lebanese leaders, which feels like bringing a strongly worded agenda to a building that is on fire.

stories.hed: May Day Strong: Half a Million Workers and Teachers Walk Out Nationwide
stories.dek: More than 500 labor unions and organizations launched 'May Day Strong' boycotts of work, school, and shopping across cities from Boston to San Francisco to protest Trump's policies. Charlotte, NC actually canceled school preemptively because so many teachers RSVP'd to the walkout.

stories.hed: Congress Bickers Over Whether Iran War 60-Day Clock Has Actually Run Out
stories.dek: Today marks what many lawmakers believe is the 60-day War Powers deadline for the Iran conflict, but Republicans and the White House can't agree on whether ceasefire days count, who gets to decide, or what day it even started. The Constitution, apparently, left some things ambiguous.

stories.hed: Trump and Melania Demand Jimmy Kimmel Be Fired After Correspondents Dinner Shooting
stories.dek: Three days before an armed man stormed the White House Correspondents Dinner checkpoint, Kimmel joked that Melania had 'the glow of an expectant widow.' After the shooting, both Trumps publicly called for ABC to fire him. Kimmel has not yet responded, but his writers' room is presumably very busy.

markets.context: Apple's earnings beat and Iran peace proposal news lifted stocks and dropped oil prices Friday, giving Wall Street permission to briefly forget about the Strait of Hormuz.

gas.note: Up 9 cents in one day and 33 cents in one week — your wallet is now a war casualty.

popCulture.hed: The Devil Wears Prada 2 Opens Today With $10M in Previews and $90M-$100M Weekend in Sight
popCulture.dek: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci all returned for the long-awaited sequel, which earned $10M in Thursday previews alone and is projected to dominate the opening weekend of summer 2026. Critics call Streep 'viciously funny' and the plot 'underbaked,' which is honestly exactly what millennial women asked for.

genZ.term: Triple T Dance (Tung Tung Tung Sahur)
genZ.definition: An AI-generated Indonesian brainrot character — a wooden stick-figure holding a baseball bat — that went globally viral via TikTok and has now spawned a full dance trend in 2026 where users film themselves doing the 'Get In There Bow' dance alongside the animated creature. The original meme references a Ramadan tradition of beating drums to wake people for the pre-dawn meal, then went completely unhinged from there.
genZ.usage: Trump saying only 'a handful' of people know the status of Iran talks is very much Tung Tung Tung Sahur energy — chaotic, repetitive, and somehow still going.

tldr: Day 63 of the Iran war arrived with a new peace proposal from Tehran and gas prices spiking to a 4-year high, while America simultaneously watched The Devil Wears Prada 2 and argued about whether Congress has any say in any of this. Miranda Priestly and the War Powers Resolution both remain, for now, unresolved.
